title: Cobblemon Emissive Textures
description: This pack adds emmisive textures to ores and items from Cobblemon, Ascension Megamons and Hulis Z-Crystals
body:
You can use this in your modpack if you wish so

## **!REQUIRED DEPPENDENCIES!**
All Modloaders(Fabric, Forge, NeoForge):
[Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon)

Fabric & NeoForge:
[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)

Forge:
[MoreMcmeta](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta)

[MoreMcmeta Emissive Textures Plugin](https://modrinth.com/mod/moremcmeta-emissive)

Optional Dependecies:
[Ascension Megamons (Cobblemon)](https://modrinth.com/mod/ascension-megamons)

[Hulis Z-Crystals](https://modrinth.com/mod/hulis-z-crystals)

# 
This pack adds emissive textures to ores and items from Cobblemon and Ascension Megamons.
There's also a personal version for ore's that I feel like shouldn't be emissive, you can find it here.

# Cobblemon Emmisive Textures

Emmisive Cobblemon Ores:
